name: cdlab-projects
description: Personal skill for maintaining the cdlab projects monorepo

metadata.description: Playbooks + templates tuned to the cdlab projects-monorepo (https://github.com/WuChenDi/projects): scaffolding new apps/packages, bumping pnpm catalog deps, cross-app refactors, code review, and documentation sync — anchored to the existing apps' conventions (baccarat DO, byplay-log/dropply-api Hono middleware, shortener KV invalidation, SecureC/flox Next.js layout).

plugins.name: cdlab-projects
plugins.description: Use to scaffold, upgrade, refactor, review, or document any project in the cdlab projects-monorepo.
